title: Bric Back Limited T/A Gamamwe Ranches v Kirkpatrick (CCZ 2 of 2021) [2021] ZMCC 13 (20 July 2021)
case_name: Bric Back Limited T/A Gamamwe Ranches v Kirkpatrick
issue_tags: limits on appeals against refusal to refer; Industrial Relations Division
exclusive jurisdiction under s.85 and s.85A
payroll retention pending severance; procedural commencement (originating summons vs petition).
outcome_detail: summons and we dismiss it with costs to the Respondent
